english: Salutations to Narayana, salutations to Narayana
Salutations to Narayana, salutations to Keshava
Salutations to Padmanabha, salutations to Madhava
Salutations to Madhusudana, salutations to Trivikrama
Salutations to Vamana, salutations to Shridhara
Salutations to Hrishikesha, salutations to Padmanabha
Whoever reads these eight names of Vishnu daily with devotion and purity
roman: Vishnor nama ashtakam yah pathet nityam bhaktitah shuchihi

english: Attains the abode of Vaikuntha, the supreme state
roman: Vaikuntha dhama nilayam prapnoti paramam padam
